creator: sutton@aardvark.apana.org.au
text:
Step back to the 80's and emulate the Atari 800 and XL series of home
computers. This was my first computer so it has a special place in my
heart. :-)

Fix: 

ftp://ftp.FreeBSD.ORG/pub/FreeBSD/incoming/atari800.tar.gz

Please add this to the ports collection when/if you have a
moment. Minimal changes to the make file may be necessary for the
current ports collection but I hope not as I've just downloaded the
recent system make files etc.

This port ftp's two files: a) Atari800-0.8.0.tar.gz and b)
xf25.zip. xf25 contains copyright ROM's and cannot be distributed. The
emulator source is a different matter and it would be great if we could
consider putting it on the cd-rom & mirror. Atari800 falls under the
GPL Version 1. 

If there are any problems please email me. Thanks, Joel...
